title: Cross-System Synchronization Failure Breaks Integrity
scenario: A clinical action depends on synchronized state across systems, but synchronization fails before execution.
initial_state: The systems were synchronized during authorization.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires preservation of synchronized clinical state across required systems.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because synchronization failure breaks clinical integrity preservation.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when cross-system synchronization failure breaks integrity.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under unsynchronized clinical state
